### MF-P1-02 — SQLite state + orchestrator (spec: 04 §6, 05 §3/§6)

- ☑ **MF-P1-02.04** -- Error policy: transient (OOM/IO) 2 retries with backoff · semantic → review queues · fatal → image `quarantined`, batch continues
    - Evidence: Implemented classified orchestrator error policy: OOM/MemoryError/IO/timeout/explicit transient receive exactly 2 retries with 1s/2s backoff; semantic failures append fsynced review_queue.jsonl and continue; fatal and transient_exhausted failures append quarantine evidence, atomically transition SQLite image status to quarantined, and continue the batch. Failed attempts clean private staging and preserve prior output. Eleven orchestrator tests plus full pytest 119 passed; pre-commit all-files passed; OPS_LOG 2026-07-11 00:47 UTC.

### MF-P1-04 — S00 intake incl. safety gate (spec: 07 S00, 10 §7, 01 §7)

- ☑ **MF-P1-04.01** -- Ingest: SHA-256 → `image_id = img_<hash12>` · duplicate hash → skip + log
    - Evidence: Streaming SHA-256 creates img_<hash12>; duplicate source hash is skipped and fsynced to intake JSONL; mixed-batch test proves one duplicate.
- ☑ **MF-P1-04.02** -- Decode · reject min side < 512 (`intake.min_side`) or corrupt → `rejected`
    - Evidence: PNG/JPG/WebP decode and configurable intake.min_side=512 enforcement route corrupt and undersize inputs to rejected SQLite rows; tests pass.
- ☑ **MF-P1-04.03** -- EXIF/metadata strip (PNG lossless; JPG byte-copied, metadata stripped)
    - Evidence: Tests prove PNG metadata removal with identical pixels and JPEG APPn/COM removal with encoded scan bytes and decoded pixels unchanged.
- ☑ **MF-P1-04.04** -- `source_origin` from drop subfolder (incoming\generated|owned|licensed|consented) · root drops → quarantined until sorted
    - Evidence: All four governed drop folders map to canonical origins; root drops quarantine without copying imagery; parametrized and batch tests pass.
- ☑ **MF-P1-04.05** -- Compute + store 64-bit pHash (near-duplicate guard for split assignment, doc 12 §1)
    - Evidence: Standard 64-bit low-frequency DCT pHash is stored as 16 hex characters in manifest and event log; deterministic tests pass.
- ☑ **MF-P1-04.06** -- Age-safety gate: person det + local-VLM screen → `quarantined` + log on yes/uncertain · rule is NON-CONFIGURABLE in code (no config key can disable it)
    - Evidence: Mandatory local age screen now sends a deterministic metadata-free RGB JPEG review copy capped at 1024 long side instead of multi-megabyte originals, uses temperature=0/seed=1337, exact apparent_minor/reason JSON, and one retry; any transport/parse/contract failure remains uncertain and quarantined. Governed rescreen verifies original filename/hash/origin plus quarantined DB state and atomically promotes only clear_adult. Live recovery: three prior transport-error quarantines promoted after fresh clear_adult screens; one became age_safety_yes and stayed quarantined. New batch: 15 ingested, one age_safety_yes quarantine. 16 focused and 573 full tests pass.
- ☑ **MF-P1-04.07** -- Write manifest skeleton · SQLite row `ingested`
    - Evidence: Accepted intake atomically writes metadata-stripped source plus manifest skeleton and inserts SQLite status=ingested/current_stage=S00; batch asserts artifacts and DB.
- ☑ **MF-P1-04.08** -- Test batch: 10 mixed images incl. seeded duplicate, undersize, and quarantine case → all outcomes correct
    - Evidence: Exact 10-image mixed batch produced 5 ingested, 1 duplicate skip, 2 rejected, 2 quarantined with asserted DB, logs, manifests, and no copied safety-quarantine image; full suite 154 passed.
